Cyperus rotundus is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The bioactive constituents of Cyperus rotundus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been shown to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities.
